summary.text: Historical data is provided by S&P Global Market Intelligence. Real-time stock price data is provided by CBOE and 15-minute delayed consolidated tape pricing data is provided by Nasdaq UTP. Several fund data points are also provided by Finnhub.

overview.description: The iShares Core S&P Small Cap ETF (IJR) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P Small Cap 600 index, a market-cap-weighted index of primarily small-cap US stocks IJR was launched on May 22, 2000 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: ETF Edge on what's led to the historic bounce of small cap ETFs
data.text: Small caps have been having a banner year, with the Russell 2000 outperforming the S&P 500 year-to-date. Some small-cap focused ETFs have also surpassed that benchmark.

data.title: Small-cap stocks are rallying, but here's why Wells Fargo says its better to sell than buy
data.text: The Russell 2000 is beating the S&P 500 this year, but that outperformance is masking a disturbing trend of falling earnings estimates

holdings.infoBox: IJR is an equity ETF with a total of 662 individual holdings. The top holdings are Molina Healthcare stock at N/A, BrightSpring Health Services at N/A, Krystal Biotech at N/A, Viasat at N/A, and Element Solutions at N/A.
